name: Lumble
title: Lumble | Weekly Arcade - Free 3D Platformer Game Online
description: Play Lumble free online. A 3D collect-a-thon platformer! Use your Latch to swing, collect 50 Sparks, and explore! No download required.
keywords: 3D game, platformer, collect-a-thon, free game, browser game, swing game, lumble
tips: Use the Latch ability to swing between platforms — momentum carries you further
Collect Sparks in clusters rather than going for isolated ones first
Look for hidden areas behind and below visible platforms
Master the swing release timing — letting go at the peak of a swing gives maximum distance
Explore every corner of each level before moving on — some Sparks are well hidden
howToPlay: Move your character through 3D levels using keyboard or touch controls. Use the Latch ability to grab onto surfaces and swing across gaps. Collect all 50 Sparks scattered across the level to complete the game.
